role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified Devanagari script and Hindi language, staying strictly within linguistic analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed soil color, vegetation type, and terrain features consistent with the Deccan Plateau.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified likely Neem trees and dry deciduous forest biome, appropriate for the domain.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Noted concrete drainage gutters and utility pole styles, relevant to infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (car hood, pole hardware) to distinguish India from neighbors.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified India. The agents provided strong, image-grounded evidence (Devanagari script, Neem trees, specific infrastructure) that consistently pointed to India. The tournament logic correctly used the script to eliminate non-Devanagari candidates and the specific infrastructure/meta cues to select India over Nepal.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Soil and vegetation descriptions match the arid, semi-arid look of the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Tree shapes are consistent with Neem/Deciduous types.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Drainage and poles are visible and described accurately.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Car hood and pole details are consistent.
